violations.description: COLD AND HOT STORAGE EQUIPMENT (4 pts): Cold holding unit in the facility being used for cold holding temp of 41 degrees F was not functioning adequately. (Traulsen cooler). PHF dscarded at this time.
HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): Two hand washing lavatories noted not easily accessible to wash hands.
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): A couple wiping cloth buckets noted not adequate sanitizing solution.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Meat slicer noted in need of cleaning / sanitizing.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Some shelving inside walkin cooler noted not in good repair.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Some shelving inside walkin coolers noted in need of cleaning. Pop gun drain behind front bar noted in need of routine cleaning.
PLUMBING SYSTEM (1 pts): No cold water at front handsink.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floor in ware-washing area noted not in good repair. Ceiling tiles in front servcie arewa noted in need of cleaning or replacement.
SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): The temperature of the rinse cycle of the heat sanitizing dish machine noted not adequate to achieve final sanitization. (repaired today)
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Small food storage containers and large bins noted not properly labeled.
REFUSE STORAGE (1 pts): Exterior garbage container noted not covered with tight fitting lids. ( Lids are up )

FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Ware-washing area: -Ceiling vent cover noted in need of cleaning. -One ceiling vent cover noted missing. -Ceiling vent cover noted rusting. Ceiling tiles around vent need cleaning. -Floor noted in need of repair- reseal. ----------------------------------------------- One floor tile in front service area noted broken needs replaced. Steps to back exit and to lower level need routine cleaning.
